QF.id: I Clearing Settlement and Risk Management_40

question.text: Only FPIs (Foreign Portfolio Investors) are permitted to offer which type of collateral?

answer.text: Foreign sovereign securities with AAA ratings

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Only FPIs can provide foreign sovereign securities (AAA rated) as collateral. Other participants cannot offer foreign securities. **The Trap:** This privilege is FPI-specific — domestic participants cannot use foreign sovereign securities. **Cross-Exam Context:** Collateral eligibility is tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This accommodates FPIs who may have their assets predominantly in foreign securities.
